What We Offer

Seven Ways We Brand
Your Business

From full fleet wraps to business cards — we deliver fast, affordable, professional results every time.

01

Full Vehicle Wrap

Complete edge-to-edge coverage for your commercial vehicle. Maximum brand impact wherever your fleet travels. Full wraps typically take 1–2 days depending on vehicle size.

02

Partial Vehicle Wrap

Strategic partial coverage — doors, hood, rear, or custom panels. Cost-effective and eye-catching. Partial wraps can often be completed same-day depending on the vehicle.

03

Custom Apparel

Branded uniforms, shirts, jackets, and hats for your team. Custom print and embroidery in a range of styles. All clothing is unisex / gender-neutral.

04

Business Cards

Professional custom business cards printed to your specifications. Matte, gloss, or soft-touch finishes available. Shipped directly to you via Canada Post or UPS at no extra charge.

05

Custom Pens & Office Equipment

Branded pens, notepads, highlighters, and office accessories. Great for client gifts and trade shows. Shipped directly to you at no extra charge.

06

Signs & Banners

Pull-up banners, vinyl signage, storefront signs, and trade show displays. Custom sizes for any environment, indoor or outdoor. Shipped or installed depending on project.

07

Others

Don’t see what you need? Tell us about your project. If we can brand it, we’ll do it. Describe your request and we’ll reach back out with a custom quote.

How We Work

Simple Process.
No Surprises.

From first contact to finished product — here’s exactly what working with FleetWrapsBC looks like.

1

You Submit Your Quote

Fill out your service specifications online. Upload any design files you have. No payment required at this stage — just tell us what you need.

2

We Reach Out Within 1–2 Business Days

We’ll contact you by your preferred method — email, phone, DM — to confirm your order details and discuss any questions we have.

3

Design Approval

We send you the design for review. You approve it or request changes — we refine until you’re completely satisfied.

4

Production & Delivery

For items like business cards and pens, we ship directly via Canada Post or UPS — no extra shipping charge. For vehicle wraps, we come to your location at a time that works for you.

5

Installation

Partial wraps are typically completed same-day. Full wraps may take 1–2 days depending on the vehicle. We work at your shop or location.

Good to Know

Turnaround Time
Partial wraps: same-day (depending on vehicle)
Full wraps: 1–2 business days
Print items: 3–7 business days + shipping
Shipping
Business cards, pens, and other print items ship via Canada Post or UPS. Shipping is included — no extra charge.
Vehicle Wraps
We come to your location at a scheduled time. We work in your shop, yard, or parking lot across BC.
Payment Methods
We accept all of the following:
PayPal CashApp Venmo Interac E-Transfer Cash

We Come to You
Across Southern BC
